prose.en: When transferring information between different security domains, implement {param:ac-4.19_prm_1} on metadata.

parameters.name: ac-4.19_prm_1
parameters.label: organization-defined security or privacy policy filters

guidance.en: All information (including metadata and the data to which the metadata applies) is subject to filtering and inspection. Some organizations distinguish between metadata and data payloads (i.e., only the data to which the metadata is bound). Other organizations do not make such distinctions and consider metadata and the data to which the metadata applies to be part of the payload.

prose.en: when transferring information between different security domains, {param:ac-04.19_odp.01} are implemented on metadata;
when transferring information between different security domains, {param:ac-04.19_odp.02} are implemented on metadata.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of security policy filtering criteria applied to metadata and data payloads
Organizational personnel with information flow enforcement responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing information flow enforcement functions

guidelines.en: security policy filters to be implemented on metadata are defined (if selected);
privacy policy filters to be implemented on metadata are defined (if selected);
